metadata.description: Agent AI skill sets — Knowledge (Design Patterns, Refactoring, SOLID, Debugging, Clean Architecture, Testing, API Design, Security, Scrum, Performance, Microservices, Git Workflow, CI/CD, Accessibility, Database Design, Verification Before Completion, Dispatching Parallel Agents, Subagent-Driven Development), Tools (Agentic Rules Writer, Ticket Writer, Agent Creator, Plugin Creator, Brainstorming, Using Virtuoso), Frameworks (Symfony Components, Symfony Upgrade, Django Components, LangChain Components), Playbooks (PHP Upgrade, Composer Dependencies, Finishing Branch), Roles (Product Manager, Architect, Backend Dev, Frontend Dev, QA Engineer, Project Manager, Scrum Master), and Agents (15 specialist and role agents)

plugins.name: knowledge-virtuoso
plugins.description: All knowledge skills — design patterns, refactoring, SOLID, debugging, clean architecture, testing, API design, security, scrum, performance, microservices, git workflow, CI/CD, accessibility, database design, verification before completion, dispatching parallel agents, and subagent-driven development

plugins.name: tools-virtuoso
plugins.description: All tool skills — agentic rules writer, ticket writer, agent creator, plugin creator, brainstorming, and ecosystem discovery advisor

plugins.name: frameworks-virtuoso
plugins.description: All framework skills — Symfony components and upgrade guide, Django components, and LangChain ecosystem references

plugins.name: playbooks-virtuoso
plugins.description: Operational playbooks — PHP version upgrade (Rector, PHPCompatibility, per-version breaking changes), Composer dependency management (safe update strategies, security auditing, Dependabot/Renovate), and finishing a development branch (pre-push verification, integration strategies, PR messages, cleanup, and recovery)

plugins.name: agents-virtuoso
plugins.description: All 15 agents with role skills — 8 specialist agents (investigator, implementer, reviewer, refactor-scout, dependency-auditor, doc-writer, migration-planner, test-gap-analyzer) and 7 role agents with matching role skills (product-manager, architect, backend-dev, frontend-dev, qa-engineer, project-manager, scrum-master)
